title: Visual Hanging Apples
description: A neat little addition to make your worlds feel more alive! Does not mean you will get an apple from that block, it's just visual.
body:
With this resource pack, Oak trees will look nicer, as some leaves will have Apples hanging off them! Breaking those leaves will **not** give you an apple, as this pack is just visual. Still, it will be a great decoration.

This pack should also be compatible with most packs that changes the models for the oak leaves, as this uses a separate model which is joined with the oak leaves model with multiparts (really cool feature), so you can try it with most bushy leaves packs. It won't be fully compatible (or not compatible at all) with anything that changes blockstates, so be warned.
